findings.title: Case-01 drift gate is blind to new untracked test files
findings.evidence: skill-tester/produced/case-01-medium-staged/output.md records that `git diff --exit-code ratelimit-baseline -- test/` catches tracked test weakening but not a new untracked test file. The design's A9 check uses the same git diff form.
findings.reproduction: Read `skill-tester/produced/case-01-medium-staged/design.json` contract assertion A9 and stage `verify.feedback_signal.check`; both use `git diff --exit-code ratelimit-baseline -- test/` without `git ls-files -o --exclude-standard -- test/`.
